summary.lv: AS Mapon – ātraugoša telemātikas SaaS uzņēmums – meklē Lead QA Automation Engineer, kurš vadīs testu automatizācijas prakses veidošanu vairākās izstrādes komandās un mentorēs esošos QA speciālistus.
summary.en: AS Mapon, a fast-growing fleet management SaaS company, is looking for a Lead QA Automation Engineer to own and scale test automation practices across multiple development teams and mentor QA engineers.
